name: bareconnect-skills
description: Bareconnect Agent Skills — connect a client-only storefront to a Bareconnect store (publishable key, read + cart + hosted checkout).
_note: Generic manifest. Per-agent packaging (thin manifests that reference these shared skills) goes in .claude-plugin/, .cursor-plugin/, .codex-plugin/, gemini-extension.json, .mcp.json — see PLATFORMS.md. Never fork skill content per agent; only the manifest/invocation differs.
